current_role: Constrained transparent activity verb + visible object structure
observed_overlap: A separated VO compound can surface as a verb followed by expanded nominal material.
decisive_difference: Transparent composition does not preserve a stored compound meaning, link discontinuous components, or restrict separators item by item.

current_role: Research-pending wrapper for selected sourced postverbal complement profiles
observed_overlap: An inserted element or the second compound component may be postverbal.
decisive_difference: Generic complement structure does not identify the two compound components or predict retained idiomatic meaning and licensed separation.

current_role: Analyze independently visible aspect, quantity, modification, or information-structure material
observed_overlap: Can represent the internal separator and its local contribution.
decisive_difference: Local analysis of intervening material neither proves compoundhood nor supplies an item-specific separation license.

current_role: A contiguous lexicon entry can preserve stored meaning
observed_overlap: Shares the same lexical identity and unsplit surface.
decisive_difference: A single contiguous token entry does not recognize or constrain discontinuous realizations.

current_role: Research unit for coordinate, subordinative, subject-predicate, verb-resultative, and other non-VO compounds
observed_overlap: Shares lexical identity across restricted discontinuity and several tested separators.
decisive_difference: VO and non-VO items differ in morphological relation, aggregate rates, separator profiles, and final-component movement.
